result.stdout:
Description:
  Add beautiful, accessible components to your Blazor app. Inspired by shadcn/ui.

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init                 Initialize ShellUI in your Blazor project
  add <components>     Add component(s) to your project
  list                 List available components
  remove <components>  Remove component(s) from your project
  update <components>  Update component(s) to latest version

commands.payload:
Description:
  Add beautiful, accessible components to your Blazor app. Inspired by shadcn/ui.

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init                 Initialize ShellUI in your Blazor project
  add <components>     Add component(s) to your project
  list                 List available components
  remove <components>  Remove component(s) from your project
  update <components>  Update component(s) to latest version

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add component(s) to your project

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI add <components>... [options]

Arguments:
  <components>  Component name(s) to add (space or comma-separated)

Options:
  --force         Overwrite existing components
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Add component(s) to your project

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI add <components>... [options]

Arguments:
  <components>  Component name(s) to add (space or comma-separated)

Options:
  --force         Overwrite existing components
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Initialize ShellUI in your Blazor project

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI init [options]

Options:
  --force                Reinitialize even if already initialized
  --style <style>        Choose component style (default, new-york, minimal) [default: default]
  --tailwind <tailwind>  Choose Tailwind method (standalone, npm) [default: standalone]
  --yes                  Run in non-interactive mode with default options
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Initialize ShellUI in your Blazor project

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI init [options]

Options:
  --force                Reinitialize even if already initialized
  --style <style>        Choose component style (default, new-york, minimal) [default: default]
  --tailwind <tailwind>  Choose Tailwind method (standalone, npm) [default: standalone]
  --yes                  Run in non-interactive mode with default options
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  List available components

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI list [options]

Options:
  --installed     Show only installed components
  --available     Show only available components
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Update component(s) to latest version

Usage:
  ShellUI.CLI update [<components>...] [options]

Arguments:
  <components>  Component name(s) to update (empty = all)

Options:
  --all           Update all installed components
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
